Index.title: Websites, booking systems, and automation for service businesses ready to grow
Index.description: Growonio builds modern digital systems that help service businesses win more inquiries, manage bookings cleanly, and reduce manual operational work.
Index.supportingLine: Built for Romania first, with bilingual delivery, SEO-ready structure, and admin-friendly handover from day one.
Index.metaTitle: Growonio | Business Automation for Service Businesses in Romania
Index.metaDescription: Growonio builds conversion-focused websites, automations, booking systems, and digital workflows for service businesses growing in Romania.
Index.servicesPreviewTitle: Three core service layers presented as a fast homepage preview
Index.servicesPreviewDesc: A compact view of the main systems Growonio builds for service businesses that need stronger positioning, cleaner demand handling, and less manual work.
Index.servicesPreviewPanelDescription: The homepage stays brief, but each service is still scoped as part of one connected system built for growth and daily operations.
Index.servicesPreviewEmptyDescription: The full services page remains available while the homepage preview pulls in the current service library.
Index.solutionsPreviewTitle: Built for service businesses where operations and lead flow matter
Index.solutionsPreviewDesc: Growonio fits businesses that depend on credibility, booking clarity, and faster follow-up to convert demand into real revenue.

industryCards.title: Salons & Beauty Businesses

Index.workPreviewTitle: Selected work that shows how Growonio turns service operations into cleaner digital systems
Index.workPreviewDesc: A concise proof layer for the homepage: one stronger featured project and two supporting examples from the live work library.
Index.workPreviewPanelTitle: Curated proof, not a project dump
Index.workPreviewPanelDescription: The homepage only shows a tightly edited selection so visitors can assess quality quickly before opening the full portfolio.
Index.workPreviewEmptyDescription: The portfolio page remains available while new case studies are finalized for the homepage preview.
Index.processTitle: A structured workflow that keeps strategy and execution aligned
Index.processDesc: A clear four-step delivery flow designed to keep scope, execution, and launch expectations aligned from the start.
Index.processNoteDescription: You always know what is being built, why it matters, and what each stage unlocks for the next one.

processSteps.title: Discover
processSteps.description: We review the business model, service flow, bottlenecks, and what the digital system needs to improve first.

processSteps.title: Plan
processSteps.description: We define page hierarchy, user journeys, booking logic, content direction, and the practical delivery scope before the build starts.

processSteps.title: Build
processSteps.description: We design and implement the system with responsive UI, admin usability, technical quality, and growth-ready foundations.
processSteps.outcome: Premium system built for real use

processSteps.title: Launch & Support
processSteps.description: We test, launch, and support the rollout so your team can use the system confidently and continue improving it after handover.

Index.trustTitle: Premium execution shaped around real business needs
Index.trustDesc: The goal is not only a polished interface. It is a digital system that helps the business present itself better, handle demand more cleanly, and stay useful after launch.
Index.trustPanelDescription: Growonio balances positioning, technical quality, admin control, and automation readiness so the final product keeps supporting sales and operations over time.

proofPillars.title: SEO and structure from day one
proofPillars.description: Content hierarchy, page flow, and technical basics are planned early so the site can rank, expand, and remain understandable.

proofPillars.title: Bilingual-ready delivery
proofPillars.description: Romanian and English content, metadata, and admin considerations are designed together instead of added later as an afterthought.

proofPillars.title: Admin control and automation paths
proofPillars.description: Teams get practical editing control and cleaner operational flows, with room for future booking, follow-up, and reporting improvements.

Index.proofBrandDescription: Premium growth-tech delivery for service businesses
Index.processStep1Desc: We analyze your business bottlenecks and map out a digital strategy.
Index.processStep2Desc: We build your custom architecture with transparent milestone updates.
Index.processStep3Desc: Deployment, training, and ongoing support to accelerate growth.
Index.ctaHeading: Ready to build a stronger digital system?
Index.ctaDesc: We help service businesses launch credible websites, cleaner booking flows, and practical systems built around real operations.
Index.ctaSupportNote: Most projects start with a short discovery conversation and a practical scope recommendation.
Index.ctaPanelTitle: Clear scope, build, and launch support in one flow

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.description: Digital solutions built to help businesses grow, streamline operations, and convert more visitors into clients.
ServicesPage.supportingLine: From modern websites to booking systems and workflow automation, we build practical digital systems for service businesses in Romania and beyond.
ServicesPage.metaTitle: Business Website Design, Booking Systems & Automation | Growonio
ServicesPage.metaDescription: Growonio builds business websites, booking systems, lead capture flows, and automation solutions for service businesses in Romania.
ServicesPage.heroPanelDescription: We combine clear messaging, search-ready structure, admin control, and practical workflows so the final system keeps working after launch, not just on day one.
ServicesPage.servicesSectionTitle: Core services for modern service businesses
ServicesPage.servicesSectionDescription: Growonio keeps the offer focused: four core service areas that help businesses present themselves better online, manage demand more efficiently, and reduce manual operational work.
ServicesPage.webDesignDesc: Modern, high-performing websites built to help businesses look credible, rank better, and turn visitors into inquiries.
ServicesPage.bookingDesc: Scheduling and client-handling systems that reduce manual work, organize requests, and improve the customer journey.
ServicesPage.automationDesc: Smarter lead capture and workflow automation that helps businesses respond faster, reduce repetitive tasks, and miss fewer opportunities.
ServicesPage.mobileDesc: Custom mobile solutions for customer-facing experiences or internal business workflows when web alone is not enough.
ServicesPage.includedIntro: Our work goes beyond visual design. We build digital systems with the structure, tools, and flexibility businesses need to launch, manage content, and grow over time.
ServicesPage.includedNote: Capabilities are combined based on project scope, so you get one coherent system instead of disconnected add-ons.
ServicesPage.industriesIntro: Growonio is best suited for businesses that need a stronger online presence, better lead handling, smoother booking flows, or less manual operational work.

ServicesPage.processIntro: Every project follows a practical sequence so strategy, design, and implementation stay aligned with real business goals.

processSteps.title: Discover
processSteps.description: We review your business goals, service flow, bottlenecks, and what the website or system needs to improve.

processSteps.title: Plan
processSteps.description: We define the page structure, user journey, required tools, and delivery scope before development starts.

processSteps.title: Build
processSteps.description: We design and develop the solution with responsive implementation, admin access, and a search-ready structure.

processSteps.title: Launch & Support
processSteps.description: We test, launch, and support the handover so your team can use the system with confidence from day one.

ServicesPage.ctaTitle: Need a solution tailored to your business?
ServicesPage.ctaText: We help businesses launch modern websites, smarter booking flows, and practical automation systems built around real operational needs.

PricingPage.title: Transparent Pricing
PricingPage.description: Clear starting packages for modern websites, booking systems, and business tools.
PricingPage.metaTitle: Pricing for Business Automation and Growth Systems
PricingPage.metaDescription: Review Growonio pricing for websites, automation systems, and growth-focused digital services for service businesses in Romania.
PricingPage.heroSupportingLine: Use pricing as a planning reference, not a rigid template. Every Growonio project is scoped around business goals, operational complexity, and the level of admin or automation support required.
PricingPage.heroPanelTitle: Built to be clear, not artificially cheap
PricingPage.heroPanelDescription: The pricing structure is designed to help businesses understand starting ranges, what level of system they may need, and where support or custom delivery begins to matter.
PricingPage.packagesTitle: Choose the right level of digital system for your business stage
PricingPage.packagesDescription: These packages are structured to make comparison easier while still leaving room for practical scope adjustments based on services, booking logic, admin needs, and long-term growth priorities.
PricingPage.comparisonDescription: Use the packages to understand the likely level of investment and complexity. If the business needs deeper automation, a custom project path is usually the better fit.
PricingPage.customProjectsDesc: For mobile apps, advanced dashboards, and tailored automation workflows.
PricingPage.supportDescription: Support plans help businesses keep the system healthy after launch, whether the need is basic monitoring, faster update requests, or more active monthly help.
PricingPage.supportPanelDescription: Not every business needs the same post-launch help. These plans give a practical way to stay supported without forcing an oversized retainer from day one.
PricingPage.careGrowthFeatures: Everything in Basic|Priority update requests|Ongoing improvements
PricingPage.carePlusFeatures: Everything in Growth|Higher-priority support|More active monthly help
PricingPage.infraNote: Domain registration, hosting/platform costs, business email, and third-party subscriptions are not included by default unless clearly listed in the quote. For simple websites, a low-cost initial setup may be possible.
PricingPage.faqDescription: Common pricing and delivery questions, answered directly so businesses can understand what is included, what is separate, and how Growonio scopes projects realistically.
PricingPage.faq1A: Hosting is not automatically included with all packages to allow flexibility. However, we can set up, manage, and scale your cloud infrastructure depending on your specific needs.
PricingPage.faq2A: Domain registration is handled separately to ensure you have full ownership. We'll guide you through the process of purchasing and configuring the right domain.
PricingPage.faq3Q: Can I start small and upgrade later?
PricingPage.faq3A: Yes. Our systems are built to scale. You can start with LaunchPad and upgrade to a FlowSite or OpsCore structure as your business operations grow.
PricingPage.faq4A: Yes, we offer structured Care plans starting from €59/month for businesses that want ongoing technical monitoring, updates, and priority support.
PricingPage.faq5Q: Why are prices shown in EUR?
PricingPage.faq5A: We display pricing in EUR as the standard currency for software and digital services in the region, but invoices can be issued in RON at the official exchange rate.
PricingPage.faq6Q: Can Growonio manage hosting and business email?
PricingPage.faq6A: Yes, we can manage your complete digital infrastructure including cloud hosting and Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 business email for an additional tailored fee.
PricingPage.finalCtaTitle: Let’s choose the right setup for your business
PricingPage.finalCtaDescription: If you are not sure which package fits best, Growonio can recommend a practical starting scope based on your services, booking flow, content needs, and operational complexity.
PricingPage.finalCtaPanelTitle: Clear scope, realistic delivery, room to grow
PricingPage.finalCtaPanelDescription: The objective is to recommend the right system for the business stage now, while leaving room for better workflows, stronger content, and future automation later.

AboutPage.title: About Growonio
AboutPage.description: We believe in software that works for you, not the other way around.
AboutPage.metaDescription: Learn how Growonio approaches business automation, premium execution, and practical digital growth for service businesses.
AboutPage.heroSupportingLine: We work like a focused digital partner for service businesses that need clarity, useful systems, and accountable execution.
AboutPage.heroPanelTitle: Built to stay focused, not bloated
AboutPage.heroPanelDescription: Growonio stays intentionally narrow: websites, booking flows, lead capture, admin usability, and practical automation for service businesses.
AboutPage.missionDesc: To make powerful business automation accessible to service businesses everywhere.
AboutPage.missionLead: The goal is not to sell vague innovation. It is to build digital systems that help businesses look credible, handle demand better, and reduce manual friction.
AboutPage.principlesDescription: Each delivery is shaped around business clarity, technical quality, and long-term usefulness after launch.

values.title: Transparent Process
values.description: We avoid black-box agency work. You know what is being built, when it ships, and how it supports growth.

values.title: Built for Growth
values.description: We build systems that capture leads, manage bookings, and remove repetitive admin work.

values.title: Practical Collaboration
values.description: Communication stays concise, milestone-based, and tied to real business decisions instead of agency theatre.

AboutPage.ctaTitle: Need a digital partner who keeps things practical?

AboutPage.ctaPanelTitle: Focused scope. Clear delivery. Useful systems.

ContactPage.description: Ready to scale? Let's discuss your project.
ContactPage.metaDescription: Talk to Growonio about websites, automation, and digital systems for service businesses in Bucharest, across Romania, and beyond.

ContactPage.heroPanelTitle: A practical conversation, not a vague sales call
ContactPage.heroPanelDescription: Growonio conversations are meant to clarify fit, likely scope, and what kind of digital system would actually help the business move forward.
ContactPage.contactCardDescription: Tell us what the business does, where the current friction is, and what outcome you want the system to improve first.
projectFitItems: Booking flow or lead capture improvement
ContactPage.formTitle: Tell us about the business and the project
ContactPage.formDescription: A concise message is enough. The goal is to understand the business, the current bottleneck, and the kind of system or improvement you are considering.
ContactPage.contactFormNote: If the form ever fails, email us directly and we will still respond.

CareersPage.title: Careers
CareersPage.metaDescription: Join Growonio at an early stage. We are looking for a Romanian-speaking collaborator interested in outreach, business development, sales, or marketing.
CareersPage.heroTitle: Join Growonio at an Early Stage
CareersPage.heroDescription: We are building Growonio, a startup focused on websites, booking systems, and business automation for local businesses in Romania.
CareersPage.heroSupportingLine: Right now, we are looking for a Romanian-speaking collaborator interested in growth, outreach, business development, or marketing.
CareersPage.heroPanelTitle: Not a standard salaried role on day one
CareersPage.heroPanelDescription: Growonio is still at an early stage. We want to work with someone who understands that the first phase is about practical collaboration, validating demand, and helping the business grow in a real way.
heroPanelPoints: Honest startup stage, not corporate hiring theatre
Fair reward structure should grow with real contribution and results
Best fit for someone who wants exposure to real business building
CareersPage.aboutTitle: A small growth-tech studio focused on practical systems
CareersPage.aboutDescription: Growonio helps local businesses build a stronger online presence and improve how they manage inquiries, bookings, and simple business workflows.
CareersPage.aboutCardDescription: The work is centered on useful digital systems for service businesses in Romania, not vague startup experimentation.
CareersPage.whoDescription: This opportunity is best for a Romanian-speaking student or early-career collaborator who wants practical startup exposure and is interested in commercial growth, communication, and market learning.
whoItems: Comfortable speaking and writing in Romanian
Interested in sales, business development, outreach, or marketing
Curious about startups, offers, and how small businesses buy services
Reliable, practical, and able to communicate clearly
CareersPage.helpTitle: The role is about practical growth support, not busywork
CareersPage.helpDescription: The work can evolve with the stage of the business, but the focus is on helping Growonio learn the market, improve outreach, and support early business development.

helpItems.title: Local market research
helpItems.description: Identify business types, needs, and patterns in the Romanian local-services market.

helpItems.title: Outreach and communication
helpItems.description: Help with practical outreach, first-contact messaging, and learning what gets real responses.

helpItems.title: Lead follow-up
helpItems.description: Support structured follow-up for conversations, replies, and warm leads that should not get lost.

helpItems.title: Offer and messaging improvement
helpItems.description: Notice objections, weak points, and useful language that can make Growonio easier to understand and trust.

helpItems.title: General growth support
helpItems.description: Contribute wherever early growth needs practical help, structure, or better execution.

CareersPage.stageTitle: This is a collaboration opportunity inside an early startup
CareersPage.stageDescription: Growonio is currently at an early stage. This is not a standard salaried role at the beginning, and we do not want to present it as one.
CareersPage.stageSupportingLine: We are looking for someone who wants to collaborate in a practical way, help validate the business, and grow with us from an early stage. As client work starts, the goal is to build a fair reward structure around real contribution and results.
CareersPage.whyJoinTitle: Why this can still be valuable
whyJoinItems: Real startup exposure instead of simulated internship tasks
Direct visibility into outreach, offer shaping, and business building
Flexible collaboration around studies or early-career schedules
A chance to influence how Growonio grows from the beginning
CareersPage.fitTitle: We want a fit that is honest on both sides
CareersPage.fitDescription: The best collaboration here comes from clear expectations. This page is meant to help you self-select before applying.
CareersPage.goodFitDescription: This is likely a good match if you are energized by learning and helping build something real from an early stage.
goodFitItems: You want practical startup experience, not only theory
You are comfortable with outreach, communication, and follow-up
You care about growth, offers, and how businesses win clients
You can work with ambiguity while still staying responsible
CareersPage.notGoodFitDescription: This is probably not the right opportunity if you need a fully structured corporate role from day one.
notGoodFitItems: You want a standard salaried job immediately
You dislike outreach, commercial thinking, or direct communication
You need constant step-by-step supervision for simple tasks
You are looking only for a decorative CV line without real contribution
CareersPage.applyDescription: Use the form below and keep it simple. A clear, honest application is more useful than a polished corporate answer.
CareersPage.applyPanelDescription: Share enough context for us to understand your background, why this stage interests you, and whether the collaboration could make sense.
applyPanelPoints: Tell us what you are studying or what your background looks like now
Explain why Growonio feels interesting to you
Mention any sales, outreach, or marketing experience, even if small
CareersPage.formDescription: We are not looking for HR-style answers. Clear context, honest motivation, and practical examples are enough.
CareersPage.backgroundPlaceholder: Student in marketing, economics, communication, or similar
CareersPage.interestLabel: Why are you interested in Growonio?
CareersPage.interestPlaceholder: Tell us why this opportunity feels relevant to you and what kind of startup exposure you want.
CareersPage.experienceLabel: Do you have any sales, outreach, or marketing experience?
CareersPage.experiencePlaceholder: Share practical examples, even if they come from university projects, volunteering, side projects, or small jobs.
CareersPage.formNote: If the form does not work, email us directly and include the same details.
